enhances.context: Sets the visual direction that sk-code implements and verifies for the detected web surface

siblings.context: Design-and-build pair: this skill owns the look, sk-code owns the implementation

prerequisite_for.context: mcp-figma applies this skill's anti-default judgment whenever a Figma read or export feeds a design decision

key_topics: real design system grounding (reuse or critique-against)
derived.causal_summary: sk-design-interface vendored from Anthropic's frontend-design skill (Apache-2.0) to give the framework reusable, advisor-routable guidance for distinctive UI design. It owns aesthetic direction (palette, typography, layout, motion, copy) and a brainstorm-critique-build process that avoids templated AI defaults; sk-code owns the implementation. Lean house-template SKILL.md routes to the full principles in references/design-process/design_principles.md. The skill is Apache-2.0 only: the design principles are unchanged vendored Apache content and LICENSE.txt is its single license. The aesthetic inventory can be sourced live from a real design system you own, used as either reuse-ground (reuse its tokens and components before generating) or critique-against (name the closest realized default, then deviate). Exactly one system is resolved from the subject, never a chooser, and nothing is cached into the skill, which keeps it free of any third party license burden. The objective quality floor stays authored in references/design-process/ux_quality_reference.md as paraphrased non-copyrightable facts. When a brief asks for two or more directions, references/design-process/variation_diversity.md applies a seed-of-thought debias so the set is not N safe copies of the median: a committed random seed picks a non-median start in a subject-grounded option space and the rest are spread to be distinct, with grounding and the anti-default critique still primary and never a style chooser. The skill ships a feature_catalog/ and a manual_testing_playbook/ for sk-doc alignment.
